reviews.review_description: if i need to pay 10 dollars a month to keep my games, and i have to use tokens to buy the games, thats not even a money grab thats a money steal, i thought that all i have to do is get the game installed and thats it, but 10 dollars a month plus extra money on tokens to buy games is just stealing money, so maybe what would make it better is disable the whole “tokens for time” thing, its already enough that i have to use tokens to get the games, plus also take away the “10 dollars a month to keep the game” because thats just a lil extra(or at least lower the price a little bit)
owner i swear im gonna find your ip address and choke the f##k out of you if you dont take out paying your stealing my f###ing money f##k you

reviews.review_title: Click helpful if it cost money

reviews.review_description: Wow finally plutosphere has been added to the oculus app and can now play PC vr and steam without a pc on the oculus quest 2. But still have lentacy and lag issues which is still a problem with the performance and gameplay experience. But other than that could definitely be 5 stars easily.

I always wanted to play pcvr but don’t have a pc. I would 100% recommend this app to anyone. I’ve actually sent a few people to this app and they’ve all loved it. If you want to try pcvr I would recommend trying this app.

This app can be a good experience for awhile which is a great way to check out PC VR but if ya think outside the box for example you have to pay $10 a month in order to save your games and of course the cost each hour of play. If you would find a PC that you can make monthly payments on you would then be better off. You be the judge.

I love this app! I've used it about 5 times and the experience was really good each time! The only issue I have with it would be a slight jitter sometimes, and an audio delay but that could just be an issue with my Internet. Other than that, it's a great app and they often have giveaways so I don't have to spend any money on tokens.
ITS BETTER IF YOU USE THE SIDEQUEST VER (optional) FOR LESS LAG AND BETTER EXPERIENCE (also play killer in purple it's on gamejolt)

reviews.review_title: great for people without VR ready PCs
reviews.review_description: i honestly do not understand why a lot of people are complaining about what it costs, you have to keep in mind that they have several of these PCs that we use when we use plutosphere they need money to pay for the electric bill as well. for the people saying "you're stealing my money",  you're not being forced and you're not obligated to use this app. in all, it's great and you will literally only see lag drops if you don't have the required download speed. an amazing PCVR game i frequently play is VTOL VR and that runs smoother than butter on this, obviously if you have a VR ready computer then you should use that instead of this, but this is an amazing alternative
